title: The Saint Who Never Smiled
overview: Saint Philia works hard to protect her country, but her "charmless" demeanor earns her nothing but scorn.

title: Welcome to Parnacorta
overview: Philia tries to get adjusted to her new life in Parnacorta, while the locals try to get adjusted to her.

title: Our First Date
overview: Osvalt takes Philia on a date around Almburg while Mia tries to learn more about her sister's departure.

title: Feelings Entrusted
overview: Philia gets a new ally, and she and Mia learn more about the forces conspiring against them.

title: Golden Freesia
overview: Philia takes on an apprentice and learns more about the pasts of princes Reichardt and Osvalt.

title: Reason and Emotion
overview: Mia seeks to impart the situation's urgency to Prince Julius, while Philia and her new friends send aid.

title: The Imprisoned Prince
overview: Mia attempts to stir Prince Fernand to action while Philia reveals her own plan to save Girtonia.

title: With You, Who Gave Me Courage
overview: Mia's time with Prince Fernand bears fruit, and her aunt, Hildegarde, makes her a proposal.

title: Crossroads of Fate
overview: Julius, rattled by Fernand's improving health, attempts to solidify his control of the kingdom.

title: What I Wish to Protect
overview: As the situation deteriorates, Philia must choose between upholding her duties and following her heart.

title: Archdemon Asmodeus
overview: When Archdemon Asmodeus makes a play for his ultimate goal, Philia and all of her friends rally to stop him.

title: The Too-Perfect Saint: Tossed Aside by My Fiancé, Now in Another Kingdom
overview: Philia and her friends take on Azmodeus for the last time.
